jsonld.name: Expert Confidence Signature
jsonld.description: The characteristic epistemic relationship to certainty that arrives with each expert-personality activation — distinct hedging patterns, comfort with ambiguity, and relationship to error that feel intrinsic to domain modes rather than selected based on context.
